description.en: An optional string representing a hint given to the browser on how it should decode the image. If this value is provided, it must be one of the possible permitted values:syncto decode the image synchronously,asyncto decode it asynchronously, orautoto indicate no preference (which is the default). Read thedecodingpage for details on the implications of this property's values.
